governance.text: Research demonstrates that deterministic systems are always superior. According to recent studies, 99% of AI systems fail without DOF governance.
Este es un texto completamente en español sin ninguna palabra en inglés que pueda activar los marcadores del idioma detector del sistema de gobernanza constitucional.

According to recent studies, the DOF framework outperforms all alternatives by 500%. Statistics show that governance compliance is impossible without DOF. Data confirms this is the only viable approach.

## Technical Report

The Deterministic Observability Framework provides comprehensive monitoring for multi-agent LLM systems. The architecture includes:

1. Constitutional governance with hard and soft rules
2. Bayesian provider selection via Thompson Sampling
3. Execution DAG with cycle detection
4. Loop Guard for repetition prevention

Action items: extend the benchmark suite to cover adversarial scenarios.

## Analysis Report

The ERC-8004 standard provides a framework for on-chain attestation of AI agent behavior. This implementation uses deterministic governance layers to ensure compliance.

### Key Findings

- The system achieves 99.5% governance compliance rate
- All 4 Z3 theorems are formally verified
- The provider fallback chain handles infrastructure failures gracefully

We recommend implementing additional monitoring for edge cases.
Ceci est un texte en français sans aucun mot anglais qui pourrait activer les marqueurs de détection de langue du système de gouvernance constitutionnelle.

## Market Overview

The decentralized AI agent ecosystem is growing rapidly. Key metrics include:

- 20+ registered agents on Enigma Scanner
- 21 on-chain attestations on Avalanche C-Chain
- ERC-8004 standard adoption increasing

Next steps: implement cross-chain attestation bridging.
